description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

You can now view the Fiscal Status Report for Fiscal Year 2024 (Reiwa 6), based on the city's final accounts.

The Fiscal Status Report is a standardized format created by the Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications for all local governments nationwide. It presents financial information—such as final accounts and fiscal health indicators—in a way that is easier for residents to understand.

Fiscal Status Report for Fiscal Year 2024 (Excel file: 577.4 KB)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/zaiseika/zaimushohyo/13353.html
summary: ℹ️ Fiscal Status Report for Fiscal Year 2024 (Reiwa 6)
